text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin seems to be in high<n>spirits today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Not really... I'm the same as<n>usual.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not some hotheaded idiot like<n>Ticket. It's a
waste of energy to get<n>all worked up.
